free_text: Multiplicity and energy of neutrons from
Super-mirror neutron guide tube, neutron flux
Time-of flight for prompt neutron's energy
measurement on flight base 75.8 cm, and fission
fragments energy measurement on flight base 31.9 cm
Two types of coincidence were used
fragment(FF1) energy measurement, active area 900 cm2,
FF1 signal starts all time-of-flight system
Liquid organic scintillator NE213 in 12.8 cm
container with 5 cm thick walls, time resolution
nickel foil, thickness of U-235 sample is 140
Corrections  were made for flight-path length of
fission-fragments, for a number of neutrons emitted
by fiss.fragments, for energy loss of fiss. fragments
Error defined in proper Subents (if relevant)
BIB-info in Subent 001 and REACTION code
SD: REACTION code was modified in Subents
004 - 009 according to MEMO CP-D/856. Title changed
following first ref. MONITOR added to Subents 2,4-9.
SD: STATUS was changed in Subent 003.
SD: REACTION codes corrected in Subent 012.
spectra in the C.M. system for specified fragment
Data corresponding to Fig.3 of NP/A,632,540
Code PR,DE,N changed to PR,NU/DE after
SD: MONITOR added. 'RRE' from SF8 deleted
from REACTION code according to remark from K.Nishio.
emission energy in C.M. system As a Function of
REACTION SF6 changed from AKE to KE
multiplicity as a function of fragment mass
SD: SF5=PR -> PR/FRG, SF7=FF deleted in
multiplicities from both fragments as a function
SD: SF7=HF deleted, SF8=FCT/MXW -> MXW in
REACTION code according to MEMO CP-D/856. MONITOR added
as a function of fission fragments' total kin.energy
SF8=FCT/MXW -> MXW in REACTION code according to
MEMO CP-D/856. Col.E -> TKE in DATA section. DATA units
licity vs fragment mass for specific 5 MeV TKE bins.
SF7=FF deleted, SF8=FCT/MXW -> MXW in REACTION code
according to MEMO CP-D/856.  Col. E-MIN -> TKE-MIN and
E-MAX -> TKE-MAX in DATA section. DATA units were
licity versus total FF kinetic Energy
SF7=FF deleted, SF8=FCT/MXW -> MXW in REACTION code
according to MEMO CP-D/856. Col. E->TKE in DATA section
multiplicity versus heavy fragment mass for specific
5 MeV TKE Bins as a function of heavy fragment mass.
Data given in this Subent are the sum
SF8=FCT/MXW -> MXW in REACTION code according to
MEMO CP-D/856. Col. E-MIN->TKE-MIN and E-MAX->TKE-MAX
in DATA section.DATA units changed: PT/FIS/MEV->PRT/FIS
SF7=N/LF deleted; SF8=MXW -> MXW/MSC in REACTION codes.
.From the Text of Reference Five - Preliminary Publ.
